purpose: Probe whether a pre-mismatch host-detail anchor can support an OpenStack inventory-drift slot without collapsing into direct taxonomy matching.

cases.eligibility_note: Inventory-drift probe anchored to the host-detail poll immediately before the scheduler reports an InstanceList mismatch.
